Comment.MultiLanguageText: PLC-derived: J1 axis is enabled / ready (mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X3 — production-canonical Ready bit per v9 FB_AxisManualWiring). Set by FB_ManualCtrl REGION 5 (status mirror).
PLC-derived: J2 axis is enabled / ready (mirror of J2_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X3).
PLC-derived: J3 axis is enabled / ready (mirror of J3_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X3).
PLC-derived: J4 axis is enabled / ready (mirror of J4_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X3).
PLC-derived: J1 axis is homed (mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X5 — per ABCDE GDB_Control.axesHomed convention).
PLC-derived: J2 axis is homed (mirror of J2_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X5).
PLC-derived: J3 axis is homed (mirror of J3_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X5).
PLC-derived: J4 axis is homed (mirror of J4_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X5).
PLC-derived: J1 axis has fault (mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X1 — per v9 axesError convention).
PLC-derived: J2 axis has fault (mirror of J2_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X1).
PLC-derived: J3 axis has fault (mirror of J3_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X1).
PLC-derived: J4 axis has fault (mirror of J4_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X1).
PLC-derived: J1 axis is moving (NOT StatusWord.%X7 standstill — derived as "non-standstill"). Useful for HMI to lit a "moving" lamp during jog.
PLC-derived: J2 axis is moving (NOT StatusWord.%X7).
PLC-derived: J3 axis is moving (NOT StatusWord.%X7).
PLC-derived: J4 axis is moving (NOT StatusWord.%X7).
PLC-derived: kinematic group is enabled (mirror of GDB_Control.axesEnabled — aggregated 4-joint Power.Status from FB_AxisCtrl REGION Power).

PLC-derived: kinematic group is ready (mirror of GDB_Control.axesReady = axesEnabled AND axesHomed AND NOT axesError). Per HMI cycle-7.1 BackColor Q&A — single Bool tag enables Range-dyn lamp binding without bit-mask workaround.
PLC-derived: kinematic group is homed (mirror of ScaraArm3D.StatusWord.%X5).
PLC-derived: kinematic group has fault (ScaraArm3D.ErrorWord <> 0). Aggregates all per-axis + kinematic-specific errors.
PLC-derived: manual Kin MC_MoveLinearAbsolute is in flight (mirror of instMoveLinAbs.Busy in FB_ManualCtrl REGION 4). HMI uses for "Manual move busy" lamp during point-to-point motion.

AttributeList.Text: Phase G (C67, 2026-05-18) — Manual-mode status mirror (PLC sole writer; HMI binds for BackColor lamps + R/O text fields). Per HMI cycle-7.1 BackColor Q&A Option A: clean PLC-side mirror (typed Bool members) preferred over runtime bit-mask of TO_Axis StatusWord (WinCC Unified Basic PlcTag does not support %X{n} bit-slice paths).
